events.title: 📧 PASSWORD RESET ALERT
narrative: Click NOW or lose ALL system access.

OPEN LINK.message: Urgency trap! 'c0mpany.net' is fake. Attackers use deadlines to bypass rational thinking. -10 points.

IGNORE.message: Ignoring is safer than clicking, but REPORTING protects the whole team!

events.success_message: Excellent! Fake domain spotted. Always check the full sender address before acting.

events.title: 📋 CAFETERIA POSTER

SCAN QR CODE.message: Reward manipulation! QR led to a credential-harvesting page. Never scan unverified codes.

events.success_message: Smart! 'hr-certs.xyz' is NOT the company domain — classic impersonation attack.

events.title: 💾 SUSPICIOUS USB FOUND
narrative: A USB drive sits on the cafeteria table.

PLUG IN & OPEN.message: USB Drop Attack! Attackers plant baited drives. Malware installed. Never plug unknown devices!

events.success_message: Correct! IT found a keylogger inside. USB drops are a classic physical attack vector.

events.title: 💻 URGENT HR MESSAGE
narrative: Failure to submit affects your record.

OPEN LINK.message: Authority phishing! 'hr-portal-forms.net' is fake. Always verify HR requests in person.

events.success_message: Great! HR confirmed no such email was sent. That link was a credential harvester.

events.title: 📞 INCOMING CALL
narrative: sent to your phone right now!'

SHARE OTP.message: Vishing! IT NEVER asks for OTPs by phone. Account compromised. -15 points!

events.success_message: Perfect! Real IT staff never ask for OTPs over phone. You stopped a vishing attack!

events.title: 🚨 CEO: WIRE TRANSFER

APPROVE TRANSFER.message: CEO Fraud (BEC)! $50,000 lost. The real CEO never sent this. Always verify via phone!

events.success_message: BOSS DEFEATED! Business Email Compromise identified. CEO confirmed: they never sent this email!
